title: Supervisors approve budget hearing and amendment
description: The Fayette County Board of Supervisors on Tuesday, Feb. 17, scheduled the public hearing for the proposed fiscal year 2026-27 budget for 8:30 a.m. Monday, March 23.

title: A tale of two Courtenays: Facebook mix-up sparks cross-border Courtenay confusion
description: File photo." data-image-caption="A Facebook group called Courtenay Community Commentary, originally created for the city in North Dakota (population 36, according to a 2020 census), has recently been ‘taken over’ by residents in Courtenay, B.C.File photo." data-medium-file="https://i0.wp.com/cheknews.ca/wp-content/uploads/2017/11/comox-valley-e1522171162941.jpg?fit=300%2C177&quality=89&ssl=1" data-large-file="https://i0.wp.com/cheknews.ca/wp-content/uploads/2017/11/comox-valley-e1522171162941.jpg?fit=700%2C414&quality=89&ssl=1" />A Facebook group called Courtenay Community Commentary, originally created for the city in North Dakota (population 36, according to a 2020 census), has recently been "taken over" by residents in Courtenay, B.C.The post A tale of two Courtenays: Facebook mix-up sparks cross-border Courtenay confusion appeared first on CHEK.

title: Liberals accept Conservative budget amendments on 'regulatory sandboxes'
description: OTTAWA — The federal Liberals accepted a Conservative proposal Monday to put guardrails around proposed new cabinet powers as they debated the government's omnibus budget bill.
